     the Fermi energy is    -0.7113 ev

!    total energy              =   -7324.01726720 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          5.0E-09 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.18585615 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =   -7323.83141104 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -150292.46006749 Ry
     hartree contribution      =   75843.14186137 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -2813.76972180 Ry
